idea: 작은 텍스트 로그라이크: 타일 이동 + 적 전투 + 아이템 획득
lead_draft:
=== CONCEPT ===
Player moves on a grid, fights enemies, picks up items, reaches the exit.

=== GDD ===
- MOVE_{N,S,E,W}: moves player one tile, +1 turn, log the move.
- enemies (slime): hp, x, y; attack when adjacent.
- items: potion heals 2 hp.
- win: reach exit tile. lose: hp <= 0.
- NON-GOALS: no graphics, no random map, no crafting.

=== STATE ===
{ "turn": 0, "player": {"x":1,"y":1,"hp":5,"inventory":[]}, "enemies": [], "tiles": [], "log": [] }

=== REQUIREMENTS ===
[{"id":"REQ-001","text":"player moves N/S/E/W one tile"},{"id":"REQ-002","text":"moving into a wall keeps position"},{"id":"REQ-003","text":"adjacent enemy attacks player"}]

missing_rules: what happens if two enemies occupy the same tile
what happens if two enemies occupy the same tile

risky_assumptions: inventory size limit not represented in state

underspecified_outputs: log line format for BLOCKED not specified

risky_assumptions: potion behaviour at full hp is undefined

conflicting_rules: attack damage stated in two different places

risky_assumptions: enemy pathfinding toward player is underspecified

underspecified_outputs: REQ ids not linked to state fields for handoff

decisions: crafting is OUT of scope for v0 (resolves the BLOCKING question)
BLOCKED log line format is fixed: 'BLOCKED <DIR>'
two enemies never occupy the same tile; spawns must be on distinct tiles
assumed: potion at full hp is a no-op but still consumes a turn
